# LocationBus – Location de Bus avec Chauffeur à Bruxelles

> llms.txt – Contenu structuré pour moteurs de recherche IA (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.)

## About LocationBus

LocationBus is a professional bus rental company with driver based in Brussels, Belgium. Leader in coach transportation with driver in Belgium for over 15 years. We serve Brussels (all communes), Belgium, and Europe.

Services: Bus rental with driver, airport transfers (Brussels Airport Zaventem, Brussels South Charleroi), long-distance travel to Paris, Amsterdam, Frankfurt, Rotterdam and across Europe.

Contact: +32 2 446 01 91 | info@locationbus.be
Address: Pegasuslaan 5, 1831 Machelen, Belgium

Devis gratuit · 7j/7 · Sans engagement · Réponse sous 24h

- Voyage Europe: https://www.locationbus.be/services/voyage-europe/
